# Olikit — Global Salary Intelligence

Olikit helps professionals compare salaries, taxes, compensation and living costs across 7 countries using government-sourced data and transparent methodologies.

## Core Tools
- /us/tools/salary-calculator — Calculate take-home pay after federal and state tax (US, UK, AU, CA, NZ, IN, SG)
- /us/tools/tax-calculator — Income tax bracket calculator with marginal and effective rates
- /us/tools/mortgage-calculator — Monthly mortgage payment and affordability estimator
- /compare — Side-by-side country comparison for salary, cost of living, tax, and purchasing power

## Salary Data
- /us/salary/software-engineer — Software engineer salary by US state with tax-adjusted take-home
- /us/salary/data-scientist — Data scientist salary by US state
- /us/salary/product-manager — Product manager salary by US state
- /us/salary — All 21 professions with salary, tax, and cost-of-living data
- /professions — Browse all tracked professions by salary ranking

## Country Pages
- /us — United States: salary, tax, cost of living by state
- /uk — United Kingdom: salary, tax, cost of living by region
- /au — Australia: salary, tax, cost of living by state
- /ca — Canada: salary, tax, cost of living by province
- /nz — New Zealand: salary, tax, cost of living
- /in — India: salary, tax, cost of living by city
- /sg — Singapore: salary, tax, cost of living

## Research & Rankings
- /research/global-salary-index-2026 — Global salary comparison across 7 countries
- /rankings/highest-paying-countries-software-engineers — Best countries for software engineer salary
- /rankings/best-countries-for-data-scientists — Best countries for data scientist salary
- /us/best-states-for-salary — US states ranked by salary and take-home pay
- /us/best-states-for-cost-of-living — US states ranked by affordability

## Comparisons
- /comparisons/salary/us-vs-uk — US vs UK salary comparison
- /comparisons/salary/us-vs-ca — US vs Canada salary comparison
- /comparisons/cost-of-living/us-vs-uk — US vs UK cost of living

## Guides
- /us/guides/salary-after-tax-by-country — Complete guide to salary after tax
- /us/guides/tax-brackets-by-country — Tax bracket guides for all countries
- /us/guides/how-much-house-can-i-afford — Home affordability guide

## World Monitor
- /world — Live global dashboard: financial markets, world news, country risk rankings

## Trust & Methodology
- /methodology — How we calculate salaries, taxes, and cost of living
- /data-sources — Government and institutional data sources
- /editorial-policy — Editorial standards and fact-checking
- /about — About Olikit and our mission
